variants.name: 罗恩·韦斯莱
variants.ability: 每个夜晚，你会得知一名当晚曾被邪恶阵营选择的玩家（或者你得知今晚没有玩家被邪恶阵营选择）。
variants.firstNightReminder: Wake and tell them a player who was chosen by the evil team tonight.
variants.otherNightReminder: Wake and tell them a player who was chosen by the evil team tonight.
variants.flavor: Well, White moves first. And then... We play.
